title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adhesives & Allied Products - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adhesives & Allied Products - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
